name: State Bank Of The Lakes, National Association
description_short: State Bank of The Lakes is a national association bank offering personal, small business, and commercial banking services with community-focused solutions.
description_long:
State Bank of The Lakes, National Association operates as a community bank serving personal, small business, and commercial customers through its website at sbotl.com. The institution is part of the Wintrust Financial Corporation family of community banks, which positions it within a larger regional banking network while maintaining local market presence.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of banking products including personal checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), personal credit cards, mortgages, home equity lines of credit, and wealth management services. For small business customers, they provide business checking and savings accounts, cash management tools, SBA loans, business credit cards, and real estate financing. Commercial banking services include asset-based lending, capital markets access, commercial lending, commercial leasing, treasury management, and international services. The bank also operates specialty programs including the Platinum Adventures Club for personal customers and Junior Savers Club.

State Bank of The Lakes distinguishes itself through its community banking approach and integration within the Wintrust network, which provides access to broader commercial banking resources and middle-market lending expertise. The bank emphasizes personalized service through local banking experts and offers industry-specific lending solutions for sectors including construction, franchises, professional practices, and government/non-profit organizations. Their digital offerings include online and mobile banking platforms with security-focused education resources.

As a traditional community bank, State Bank of The Lakes serves customers seeking established banking relationships with local decision-making and comprehensive financial products. However, consumers should note that as a traditional bank, they may have less competitive rates on savings products compared to online-only institutions, and their digital capabilities appear functional but not prominently highlighted as cutting-edge technology differentiators. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Wealth management and private client services
pros: Comprehensive product suite spanning personal, small business, and commercial banking under one institution
Access to Wintrust Financial Corporation's resources and middle-market commercial banking expertise
Industry-specific lending programs for construction, franchises, government entities, and professional practices
Multiple account options including checking, savings, CDs, and credit cards with rewards programs
Wealth management and retirement benefits advisory services for personal and business clients
SBA lending programs available for small business customers
Local appointment scheduling with banking experts for personalized service
cons: Website requires modern browser support and had outdated Internet Explorer compatibility issues noted on landing page
Limited transparency on current interest rates, fees, or APRs directly visible on website
No mention of competitive advantages regarding deposit rates or loan terms compared to competitors
Digital banking capabilities mentioned but not highlighted as differentiating features
Minimal information about minimum account balances or qualification requirements for premium products
best_for: Small business owners and entrepreneurs needing comprehensive commercial banking services with local relationships
Customers seeking one-stop banking for personal, business, and wealth management needs
Commercial clients in construction, franchises, or professional services industries requiring specialized lending
Consumers prioritizing local decision-making and community bank relationships over purely digital banking
diagnosis: State Bank of The Lakes is best for small business owners, commercial clients, and consumers seeking comprehensive banking services with local relationship management within an established community bank framework. The main caveat is that as a traditional bank, customers should compare their rates and fees against online-only competitors and verify specific product terms, as these are not transparently displayed on the website.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
